title: erigeron thunbergii subsp. komarovii
intro: Erigeron thunbergii subsp. komarovii, also known as the Russian fleabane, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to China and Russia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erigeron thunbergii subsp. komarovii include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create a tincture or decoction.
